ταπεινοφρόνησις, εως, ἡ (ταπεινός, φρόνησις) humility w. μακροθυμία Hs 8, 7, 6 v.l.—TW.

Hs Hs = Similitudes

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 989
